description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure dressed in a full camouflage military uniform, including a cap, long-sleeved jacket, and matching pants. The figure's arms are unusually elongated and bent at sharp angles, giving it a surreal and distorted appearance. The hands are large and exaggerated, with long fingers splayed outward. The face is simplified, with minimal detail, and the figure wears dark boots with thick soles. The overall build is slender, and the uniform fits loosely, with the camouflage pattern covering most of the body. The figure stands upright, with its arms raised and bent in an unnatural pose, making it visually striking and somewhat unsettling.
description: A stylized adult in a camouflage military uniform with exaggeratedly long, bent arms and large hands, standing upright in boots and a cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full camouflage uniform, cap, and the extreme length and bend of both arms, with hands splayed outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharp bend in the left arm and the profile of the face and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, cap, and the full extension of the arms, with hands visible at the ends.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm's bend and the side profile of the figure, including the boots and hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with cap, long-sleeved jacket, and pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and bent at sharp angles
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
